name: claude-skills
description: Public marketplace of Claude Agent Skills for project setup and cross-session continuity.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Maintain a living HANDOFF.md that captures a project's full state — summary, current status, file map, decision log, change log, next steps, and blockers — so a fresh Claude instance with no prior memory (or a new human teammate) can resume the work by reading that one file.

plugins.name: kickoff
plugins.description: Run the day-zero setup when a new project, repository, or build effort begins.
